title: LandUseRecommendation
description: A Bronx Borough President advisory recommendation on a land-use application moving through ULURP (the Uniform Land Use Review Procedure). Issuing a written recommendation on every ULURP application in the borough is a charter-mandated duty of the Borough President. NET GAP: there is NO Open Data twin and NO API — today these recommendations are published only as PDFs in the site's Revize 'document center' (bronxboropres.nyc.gov/services/planning_development/ulurp.php). This schema is reverse-engineered from those documents and from the citywide ZAP/ULURP model; it is a read surface for what the office already produces.

applicationId.description: ULURP / ZAP application number (e.g. 'C 240123 ZMX', 'N 230456 ZRX').

actionType.description: Land-use action, e.g. Zoning Map Amendment, Zoning Text Amendment, Special Permit, Disposition, City Map Change.

recommendation.description: The Borough President's advisory disposition on the application.

conditions.description: Conditions or modifications attached to the recommendation.

communityBoardRecommendation.description: The affected community board's prior recommendation, if noted.

documentUrl.description: Link to the recommendation PDF in the site's document center.
